name: Cliche
short_description: Hit by a truck and reincarnated into an isekai?! Defeat monsters and solve villagers' quests while enjoying the happy and beautiful everyday life in the isekai.
detailed_description:
Game Overview:
An open-world ARPG where you can become a warrior and enjoy adventures while experiencing everyday life in the beautiful isekai "Fonia." Defeat monsters to level up, learn various spells, and even craft powerful weapons yourself. Start a new life in this isekai!


World and Story:
One day, you wake up to find yourself reincarnated in the unfamiliar isekai "Fonia" after a sudden truck accident. Here, you can progress through small stories by completing quests for the villagers. Of course, it's up to the player to wander the world alone and become the strongest warrior. Explore the vast lands of Fonia and grow as a warrior in this isekai!


Visuals and Sound:
Boasting serene and beautiful fantasy animation graphics. Additionally, a soothing and relaxing piano soundtrack accompanies the game throughout, allowing you to enjoy a comfortable atmosphere.
